name: Iter19 — Compare page handles gracefully when one PR URL returns 404
description: When a user enters one valid PR URL and one non-existent (404) PR URL on the Compare page and clicks Compare PRs, the app should show a clear error message for the failing PR and not crash or display a broken layout.

planSteps.description: Type https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/1 into the Old PR input field
Type https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/99999999 into the New PR input field
Verify the app shows a clear error message for the failing PR — either an error banner, error text, or a failed state indicator
Verify the page does not show a blank screen or JavaScript crash — the layout remains intact with visible content
